_comment: Open first-author preprints by M. Kloft, used with the author's permission as the real-article benchmark tier. Source PDFs are fetched on first use into ./.cache/ (gitignored, never committed); only the derived crops (crops/<key>/) and hand-reviewed labels (labels.json) are tracked, so CI is self-contained and needs no network. Regenerate crops with: python tools/build_preprint_benchmark.py [--key <key>]. osf_id null means the open preprint id still needs to be filled in before that paper can be fetched.

interval_truth.title: The Interval Truth / Consensus Model (continuous bounded interval responses)
interval_truth.authors: Kloft, M., Siepe, B. S., & Heck, D. W.
interval_truth.note: One evolving OSF preprint: early versions are titled 'Interval Truth Model', the latest (v5) 'Interval Consensus Model'. osf.io/dzvw2/download returns the latest version, so this single key covers both titles of the Psychometrika-trio pair.
interval_truth.license: author preprint; crops redistributed with author's permission

dirichlet_dual.title: The Dirichlet Dual Response Model: An Item Response Model for Continuous Bounded Interval Responses
dirichlet_dual.authors: Kloft, M., Hartmann, R., Voss, A., & Heck, D. W.
dirichlet_dual.license: author preprint; crops redistributed with author's permission

discriminant_validity.title: Discriminant validity of interval response formats: Investigating the dimensional structure of interval widths
discriminant_validity.license: author preprint; crops redistributed with author's permission

dual_range_slider.title: Measuring the variability of personality traits with interval responses: Psychometric properties of the dual-range slider response format
dual_range_slider.authors: Kloft, M., Snijder, J., & Heck, D. W.
dual_range_slider.license: author preprint; crops redistributed with author's permission
